# CWE-601 positive: open redirect via next query (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-601-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
)

// OAuthReturn forwards the browser to the caller-supplied next URL.
func OAuthReturn(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	target := r.URL.Query().Get("next")
	if target == "" {
		http.Error(w, "missing next", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	http.Redirect(w, r, target, http.StatusFound)
}
